validation_notes.b2b_filter: Companies matching B2B_SKIP_KEYWORDS are excluded from TOP 20 — they lack phone-dependency for the AI missed-call offer.
validation_notes.template_selection: Each candidate has a recommended_template field — use these in cold_outreach.py for industry-specific hooks.
validation_notes.offer_fit: Best fits: HVAC, Electrical, Roofing, Pool — emergency/scheduling calls. Worst fits: IT, fire suppression, drones, large GCs.
